mapper.select: select id, openid as openId, name, phone, password_hash as passwordHash, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from user where openid = #{openId} limit 1
select id, openid as openId, name, phone, password_hash as passwordHash, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from user where id = #{id}
select id, openid as openId, name, phone, password_hash as passwordHash, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from user where openid = #{openId} and phone = #{phone} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user( openid, name, phone, password_hash, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{openId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
